ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "num_draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Draw number of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-player combination */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the tournament */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_standings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tournament or match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament being accessed */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament or match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches_schedule" (
  "match_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match schedule */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_schedule_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_schedule_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "boundaries" INTEGER /* Number of boundaries hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "catches_taken" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_bracket" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Runner-up of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_bracket_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_bracket_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "tournament_access" TEXT /* Access to tournaments */,
  "team_access" TEXT /* Access to teams */,
  "player_access" TEXT /* Access to players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
